title: Thinkin Bout You
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
A tornado flew around my room before you came
  > [#1, 424 votes] Frank’s room represents his life; he’s well aware it was messy and out of order before he met his significant other, who brought peace into his life. However, they’ve broken up and it makes him cry...
Excuse the mess it made, it usually doesn't rain in
Southern California, much like Arizona
My eyes don't shed tears, but boy, they pour

[Pre-Chorus]
When I'm thinkin' 'bout you, ooh, no, no, no
  > [#2, 437 votes] Frank Ocean dreams of spending his life with the song’s subject, but he isn’t sure if they feel the same way, hence in the pre-chorus, he admits that he cries whenever he thinks of them. The fact...
I've been thinkin' 'bout you, you know, know, know
I've been thinkin' 'bout you, do you think about me still?
Do ya, do ya?

[Chorus]
Or do you not think so far ahead?
  > [#2, see above]
'Cause I been thinkin' 'bout forever, ooh
Or do you not think so far ahead?
'Cause I been thinkin' 'bout forever, ooh

[Verse 2]
No, I don't like you, I just thought you were cool enough to kick it
  > [#3, 342 votes] It’s possible George Strait’s “Ocean Side Property” served as inspiration for this verse. In it he sings: Girl, your memory won’t ever haunt me Cause I don’t love you, and now if you’ll buy that I...
Got a beach house I could sell you in Idaho
Since you think I don't love you, I just thought you were cute
That's why I kissed you
Got a fighter jet, I don't get to fly it though

[Pre-Chorus]
I'm lying down thinkin' 'bout you, ooh, no, no, no
  > [#2, see above]
I've been thinkin' 'bout you, you know, know, know
I've been thinkin' 'bout you, do you think about me still? (Do ya, do ya?)
Do ya, do ya? (Do ya, do ya?)

[Chorus]
Or do you not think so far ahead?
  > [#2, see above]
'Cause I been thinkin' 'bout forever, ooh
Or do you not think so far ahead?
'Cause I been thinkin' 'bout forever, ooh

[Bridge]
Yes, of course
  > [#4, 307 votes] In his 2012 open letter, Frank Ocean revealed his first love was a man, which asserts the idea that this song is about a male partner: 4 summers ago, I met somebody. I was 19 years old. He was too....
I remember, how could I forget (How could I forget)
How you feel? (How you feel?)
You know you were my first time (Time)
A new feel (Down)
It won't ever get old, not in my soul, not in my spirit, keep it alive
We'll go down this road 'til it turns from color to black and white

[Chorus]
Or do you not think so far ahead?
  > [#2, see above]
'Cause I been thinkin' 'bout forever, ooh
Or do you not think so far ahead?
'Cause I been thinkin' 'bout forever, ooh
